abstract: The component for adding a JSON data table.
overview:
## Discussion

Add a `DataTable` component that uses table data provided in a JSON format. Information about the table, including the data itself, is provided by the `data` property, whose value is a [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/RecordStore] object that contains both the table data and information about the data, such as data types and header labels.

You can apply styles to table rows, columns, and cells using a [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ComponentStyle] object that has a [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/TableStyle] defined.

### Example

items.description: Add a table to your article that displays JSON data in rows and columns.
items.name: Adding a JSON Table

items.description: The object that contains JSON data for a data table.
items.name: RecordStore

items.description: The object for providing the data type, data formatting, and label for a field in a table.
items.name: DataDescriptor

items.description: A data category by which to sort the table in descending or ascending order.
items.name: DataTableSorting

items.description: Properties shared by all data format obejct types.
items.name: DataFormat

items.description: The object that allows you to specify the number of digits after the decimal point for numeric values in data table cells.
items.name: FloatDataFormat

items.description: The object that allows you to specify the minimum and maximum dimensions for images in data table cells.
items.name: ImageDataFormat

title: DataTable
